rule.APPROVE: EXISTS ONE omega (same across all cells, both modes, both sigma_e) with median Delta_cond >= +0.10 in all four (mode, sigma_e) groups AND Delta_or >= -0.02 in >= 80% of cells in each of the four mode x sigma_e quadrants at that omega; stability-reproduced
rule.NULL: anything else - flip axis named via per-axis median Delta_cond and pass shares over {mode, sigma_e, c, sigma_v, sigma_m, f/s}
rule.REJECT: for EVERY omega and BOTH sigma_e: median-over-81-cells Delta_cond <= +0.02 in BOTH modes (all 8 (mode, omega, sigma_e) group medians)
rule.evaluation_order: REJECT checked FIRST, then APPROVE, else NULL
